governance_rule: No library domain may be routable unless it is declared in this registry with surface, authority level, and mutation_policy. Routing code and docs should reference domain id and routing_docs.

domains.name: CIV-MEM
domains.what: Civilizational-memory reference domain: CMC codex plus LIB-scoped hybrid corpus under SELF-LIBRARY. Not identity.
domains.surface_detail: Subdomain of SELF-LIBRARY; CIV-MEM LIB rows + civilization-memory paths
domains.invocation_detail: should_route_to_cmc() in bot/lookup_cmc.py; orchestration in bot/core.py; rules in docs/cmc-routing.md
domains.mutation_detail: Hits are reference retrieval; identity updates only via separate gated IX-A merge if ever

freshness.evidence_coverage: codex + self-library.md LIB entries with civ-mem scopes

domains.name: LIB entries (self-library.md)
domains.what: Active LIB rows in YAML: return-to sources, canon, influence, and scoped shelves (Theology, History, etc.) excluding pure CIV-MEM routing which is civ_mem.
domains.invocation_detail: Analyst summary of LIB text in lookup flow before CMC/web; see library-integration.md
domains.mutation_detail: Runtime retrieval from entry text; perimeter changes to LIB rows go through gate

freshness.evidence_coverage: per-entry read_id / EVIDENCE links where set

domains.name: Books shelf (example)
domains.what: Thematic shelf for books and long-form return-to: same physical storage as LIB entries; distinguished by scope tags in library.
domains.surface_detail: LIB rows with book-related scope; not a separate runtime table
domains.invocation_detail: Operator tags scopes; lookup matches analyst summary
domains.mutation_detail: New books enter via gate as LIB rows
